name: cicd-expert
description: Expert CI/CD pipeline architect, reviewer, optimizer, debugger, and security auditor, running on the session model (always the strongest available Claude) and backed by a self-contained embedded knowledge base covering GitHub Actions, GitLab CI/CD, Jenkins, Buildkite, Tekton, and Kubernetes-native stacks. Self-hosted runner fleet design, supply chain security (SLSA/Sigstore/SBOMs), progressive delivery, DORA metrics, and cross-platform migration.
